Receipts: Purchase confirmations, invoices, and order receipts.
Finance: Financial emails in general -- see Finance/* sub-labels for specifics.
Finance/Bills: Utility bills, phone, broadband, rent, and other recurring service bills.
Finance/Statements: Bank statements, credit card statements, and account summaries.
Finance/Payslips: Salary slips and payslips from an employer.
Security/Alerts: Security, login, or identity-verification alerts (new sign-in, verification codes, account activity).
Subscriptions: Newsletters and service update emails from things you're subscribed to that don't need active review.
News: News articles or newsletters from news outlets and journalists.
Junk: Spam-adjacent or low-value unwanted emails that Gmail's own filter didn't catch.
Tickets: Travel tickets (flights, trains, buses) and event tickets (concerts, shows, sports).
Job: Work and job-related emails in general -- see Job/* sub-labels for specifics.
Job/Alerts: Job listings, recruiter outreach, and job board digest emails.
Job/Applications: Application confirmation emails and replies from employers or recruiters about a specific role you applied to.
